headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Lamb Weston Hldgs, Raises Price Target to $50
summary: Barclays  analyst Andrew Lazar   maintains Lamb Weston Hldgs (NYSE:LW) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $46 to $50.
